subcodes.first_line: O ye who remain after that star which dawned in the horizon of the Abhá Kingdom, whenever to one among you a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بازماندگان آن کوکب مشرق در افق ملکوت ابهی هر وقت که بیکی از شماها نامه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
